text: You move toward the hearth. Richard doesn't move a muscle, but you can feel his gaze tracking your shadow on the floor.

name: MainChar
text: That fireplace puts out a decent amount of heat. Better than the draft by the door, anyway.

name: Richard
text: Comfort is secondary to security. The hearth is the heart of the home; it must be held at all costs.

name: MainChar
text: That's a very... dedicated way of looking at a pile of burning logs. Do you always take your 'watches' this seriously, Mr. Sterling?

name: Richard
text: A name is a heavy thing to carry. One must act in a way that is worthy of it. Do you not agree... traveler?

name: MainChar
text: I suppose. Though I usually find a comfortable seat is more 'worthy' of my time. You seem like a man who’s traveled quite a bit to end up in a place like this.

name: Richard
text: I go where I am summoned. My path is not my own to decide. If the Baron requires a blade, I am the blade.

name: MainChar (Internal)
text: He’s talking in circles. It’s like he’s reading from a script he hasn’t quite memorized. He’s terrified under all that posturing.
